  69, 73, 170, 218, 197, 214, 158, 254, 227, 205, 197, 144, 111, 5, 47, 1, 24, 89, 119, 73,
  80, 170, 175, 129, 193, 150, 226, 235, 242, 202, 214, 100, 47, 59, 6, 28, 112, 100, 126, 14,
  24, 200, 178, 182, 137, 244
}
local function _olll1IoO(t,k)
  local r={}
  for i=1,#t do
    local ki=bit32.bxor(k,(i-1)*13+7)%256
    if ki==0 then ki=1 end
    r[i]=string.char(bit32.bxor(t[i],ki))
  end
  return table.concat(r)
end
local _1lO0OOI11={}
_1lO0OOI11._IO1I111l={}
_1lO0OOI11._1ooo1l1II1IoI={}
_1lO0OOI11._oO1l1olI01IO=0
_1lO0OOI11._0looIIO0oIo=1
local function _I1l00Io1OO(v) _1lO0OOI11._oO1l1olI01IO=_1lO0OOI11._oO1l1olI01IO+1; _1lO0OOI11._1ooo1l1II1IoI[_1lO0OOI11._oO1l1olI01IO]=v end
local function _0OIoIoOoll()
  if _1lO0OOI11._oO1l1olI01IO<1 then return nil end
  local v=_1lO0OOI11._1ooo1l1II1IoI[_1lO0OOI11._oO1l1olI01IO]
  _1lO0OOI11._1ooo1l1II1IoI[_1lO0OOI11._oO1l1olI01IO]=nil
  _1lO0OOI11._oO1l1olI01IO=_1lO0OOI11._oO1l1olI01IO-1
  return v
end
local _O1Io0lI0o={}
_O1Io0lI0o[0x10]=function(a) _I1l00Io1OO(a) end
_O1Io0lI0o[0x60]=function(k)
  local _ool01O1l=_olll1IoO(_IOolIOoIlI,k)
  local _oo0l1OllO11oO,_0oolO111I01loI=loadstring(_ool01O1l)
  if not _oo0l1OllO11oO then error('[ShieldVM] '..tostring(_0oolO111I01loI)) end
  local ok,e2=pcall(_oo0l1OllO11oO)
  if not ok then error('[ShieldVM] '..tostring(e2)) end
end
_O1Io0lI0o[0xFF]=function() end
local _0looIIO0oIo={
  {op=0x60,arg=70},
  {op=0xFF,arg=0},
}
local _ooO1I1OI1O1=true
for _,instr in ipairs(_0looIIO0oIo) do
  if not _ooO1I1OI1O1 then break end
  local fn=_O1Io0lI0o[instr.op]
  if fn then
    if instr.op==0xFF then _ooO1I1OI1O1=false
    else fn(instr.arg) end
  end
end
